title: enantion #1726
definition:
1) over against, opposite
    1a) of place, opposite, contrary (of the wind)
 2) metaph.
    2a) opposed as an adversary, hostile, antagonistic in feeling or act
    2b) an opponent
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) over against, opposite
    1a) of place, opposite, contrary (of the wind)
 2) metaph.
    2a) opposed as an adversary, hostile, antagonistic in feeling or act
    2b) an opponent

    NASB:  before, in the presence of.
